MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,187.68 FILED BY MACADAM COMPUTER, INC AS TO DEFENDANT UPS CLAIMS PROCESSING CENTER MANTHE, KATHY (CUSTOMER RELATIONS MANAGER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACADAM COMPUTER, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UPS CLAIMS PROCESSING CENTER MANTHE, KATHY (CUSTOMER RELATIONS MANAGER) $1,674.68 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,784.68, PER STIPULATION. DEFT. KATHY MANTHE IS DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
